message:
Merge PR #2705: fix: nudge startup prompts for promptless role agents

Witness and refinery sessions under promptless runtimes (e.g. Codex)
were silently dropping their startup patrol prompts, leaving them idling
while appearing healthy. Adds DeliverStartupPromptFallback helper that
nudges the patrol prompt after startup fallback completes. Includes
unit test coverage for the fallback path.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2705
Author: pxjx22

Co-authored-by: Px <pxjx22@gmail.com>
